Grid.TextBlock: CINCPACFLT PEARL HARBOR HI COMUSJAPAN YOKOTA AB

SECRET
1. (S) Heavy enemy air and naval attacks have effectively suppressed Singapore and Malaysia, and have thrown Indonesia into disarray. U.S. forces are withdrawing to Darwin, Australia, to regroup and reconstitute.
2. (S) USSR naval forces are moving south from Cam Ranh likely attempting to interdict Allied shipping and close Sunda and Lombok Straits, cutting access to the Indian Ocean. Lombok Strait is designated lane for U.S. and Allied units moving south.
3. (S) Royal Malaysian Air Force reports a heavy USSR SAG proceeding east through the Java Sea. USSR SAG composed of 1 x KRESTA CG, 1 x KANIN DDG, and 1 x KRIVAK II FFG.
4. (S) Detach one surface unit from {TaskForceName} at Sandakan and proceed to Bali at best speed. HSL-35 will detail 1 x SH-2F to you for ASW patrol, and RAAF P-3C out of Broome Airbase will check in for maritime strike and reconnaissance.
5. (S) Destroy the USSR raiding force and allow Allied units to escape. Good luck. CTF 77 sends.
SECRET
DECL OADR BT
